briefs.title: Insurance Council Must Now Run Continuing Education for Agents and Adjusters in BC
briefs.summary: BC updated its Insurance Council rules to require the Insurance Council to provide ongoing training programs for general and life insurance agents, salespersons, and insurance adjusters — excluding restricted insurance agents and their staff.
briefs.action_required: Check with your insurance licence holder or the Insurance Council of BC to confirm your continuing education requirements.

key_dates.label: BC Insurance Council continuing education rule change takes effect
